reasoning.name: Reasoning & Logic
reasoning.description: Models solving complex math, code, and logic problems through step-by-step thinking
reasoning.this_period: Stable. GPT-5.5 Spud pretraining complete but not yet released or benchmarked. No new reasoning model deployments this period.

multimodality.name: Multimodal AI
multimodality.description: Models that natively process text, images, video, audio, and code together
multimodality.this_period: Stable. No new multimodal model releases this period.

agents.name: Agentic AI
agents.description: AI systems that autonomously plan, use tools, and complete complex multi-step tasks
agents.this_period: Stable. No major agentic AI announcements this period.

robotics.name: Robotics & Physical AI
robotics.description: Robots that perceive, reason, and act in physical environments alongside humans
robotics.this_period: Eclipse $1.3B fund validates VC commitment to physical AI. National Robotics Week showcased video-action models with 10x sample efficiency gains.

biology.name: Biology & Drug Discovery
biology.description: AI accelerating drug discovery, protein folding, genomics, and medical diagnostics
biology.this_period: LillyPod supercomputer goes live with 1,016 Blackwell GPUs and 9,000+ petaflops. Pharma's largest dedicated AI compute cluster. Targeting halving of 10-year drug development timelines.

code_generation.name: Code Generation
code_generation.description: AI writing, debugging, and maintaining production-quality software autonomously
code_generation.this_period: Stable. GPT-5.5 pretraining complete but not benchmarked yet. GLM-5.1 SWE-Bench Pro lead from prior period still stands.
